theme.title: Future and Conditional
theme.description: Learn how to talk about the future and hypothetical situations

lesson.title: Conditional Situations
lesson.instructions: Translate using the conditional in more detailed situations

exercises.prompt: I would travel more often if plane tickets were not so expensive.
exercises.answer: Viajaría más a menudo si los boletos de avión no fueran tan caros.
exercises.explanation: conditional with an unreal present condition

exercises.prompt: We would help you right away if we knew how to solve the problem.
exercises.answer: Te ayudaríamos de inmediato si supiéramos cómo resolver el problema.

exercises.prompt: She would accept the job, but she would prefer to work from home.
exercises.answer: Ella aceptaría el trabajo, pero preferiría trabajar desde casa.
exercises.explanation: two conditional verbs in one sentence

exercises.prompt: If I had more experience, I would apply for that position at the international company.
exercises.answer: Si tuviera más experiencia, solicitaría ese puesto en la empresa internacional.

exercises.prompt: They would buy a house near the beach if they could work remotely all year.
exercises.answer: Comprarían una casa cerca de la playa si pudieran trabajar a distancia todo el año.

exercises.prompt: Would you tell her the truth even if she got upset?
exercises.answer: ¿Le dirías la verdad aunque se molestara?

exercises.prompt: I would not change anything because the plan seems quite reasonable to me.
exercises.answer: No cambiaría nada porque el plan me parece bastante razonable.

exercises.prompt: My parents would be calmer if my brother answered their messages more often.
exercises.answer: Mis padres estarían más tranquilos si mi hermano respondiera a sus mensajes más a menudo.

exercises.prompt: We would stay longer, although tomorrow we would have to get up very early.
exercises.answer: Nos quedaríamos más tiempo, aunque mañana tendríamos que levantarnos muy temprano.

exercises.prompt: If the museum were closer, the children would visit it more frequently.
exercises.answer: Si el museo estuviera más cerca, los niños lo visitarían con más frecuencia.
